title: helichrysum spodiophyllum
intro: Helichrysum spodiophyllum, also known as the African yellow hair plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of helichrysum spodiophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
